caps.proposition_text: The clinician assesses Lisfranc fracture, left foot.
The clinician measures oxygen saturation at 99% on room air.
The clinician measures blood pressure at 118/72 mmHg.
The clinician measures heart rate at 58 bpm.
The clinician measures respiratory rate at 14.
The clinician schedules surgery for the patient.

evidence.span_text: We will see the patient on Monday, for surgery.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician measures temperature as afebrile.
The clinician observes ecchymosis on the plantar and dorsal aspects of the foot.

evidence.span_text: MSK: Examination of the left foot: Ecchymosis on the plantar and dorsal aspects of the foot. Associated swelling. Tenderness to palpation of the midfoot. Positive piano key test.

caps.proposition_text: X-ray images reveal subtle dorsal displacement of the base of the 2nd metatarsal.

evidence.span_text: X-ray images of the left foot were obtained and reviewed today. These reveal subtle dorsal displacement of the base of the 2nd metatarsal with a 3 mm separation of the 1st and 2nd metatarsal bases. There is presence of a bony fragment in the Lisfranc joint space.

caps.proposition_text: There is a 3 mm separation of the 1st and 2nd metatarsal bases.

evidence.span_text: X-ray images of the left foot were obtained and reviewed today. These reveal subtle dorsal displacement of the base of the 2nd metatarsal with a 3 mm separation of the 1st and 2nd metatarsal bases. There is presence of a bony fragment in the Lisfranc joint space.

caps.proposition_text: There is presence of a bony fragment in the Lisfranc joint space.

evidence.span_text: X-ray images of the left foot were obtained and reviewed today. These reveal subtle dorsal displacement of the base of the 2nd metatarsal with a 3 mm separation of the 1st and 2nd metatarsal bases. There is presence of a bony fragment in the Lisfranc joint space.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician orders an MRI to assess for ligamentous injuries.

evidence.span_text: I explained the nature of her injury in detail. Based on her exam and x-ray findings, she will most likely require surgery of the left foot, but I want to order an MRI to assess for any ligamentous injuries. We discussed the procedure and postoperative expectations, such as recovery time and restrictions, at length. We also discussed the complications associated with deferring surgical intervention including poor bone and ligament healing, pes planus deformation, and a high likelihood of developing arthritis in the foot. She will be unable to participate for the remainder of the soccer season, but should be able to play next season.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician observes tenderness to palpation of the midfoot.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician observes swelling of the left foot.

caps.proposition_text: The clinician recommends surgery of the left foot.

evidence.span_text: I explained the nature of her injury in detail. Based on her exam and x-ray findings, she will most likely require surgery of the left foot, but I want to order an MRI to assess for any ligamentous injuries. We discussed the procedure and postoperative expectations, such as recovery time and restrictions, at length. We also discussed the complications associated with deferring surgical intervention including poor bone and ligament healing, pes planus deformation, and a high likelihood of developing arthritis in the foot. She will be unable to participate for the remainder of the soccer season, but should be able to play next season.
